# Shreyansh Mathur — Portfolio

> Strategy Associate at PwC India. Builder-consultant at the intersection of management consulting and software engineering. CS background. React / Python / AI stack.

## Identity

- Name: Shreyansh Mathur
- Current role: Associate, Strategy — PwC India (Aug 2025 – Present)
- Location: India
- Email: shreyanshmathur12@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/shreyanshmathur
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur
- Portfolio: https://shreyanshportfolioconsultant.netlify.app

## What I do

I sit at the crossroads of consulting and engineering. By day I run enterprise strategy engagements (GCC design, AI transformation programmes, IT operating model redesign). Outside of that I build the tools the engagements wish existed — forecasting bots, AI concierges, risk dashboards, pricing engines.

The through-line: strategy that ships.

## Experience

### PwC India — Associate, Strategy (Aug 2025 – Present)
- Five-year India Tech Hub strategy for a global FMCG client: scaled 27 → 108 FTEs across 4 geographies; C-suite alignment across India, Singapore, and Dubai.
- National AI Accelerator co-lead: 12 enterprise AI tools shipped; +15% tool adoption in 90 days; zero governance incidents.
- IT operating model redesign for a national cement leader across 15+ states: 25% faster incident dispatch; unified reporting.
- Tools: Power BI, Python, SAP FICO/MM, Excel VBA, Miro, Jira

### PwC India — Advisory Intern (Jan – Aug 2025)
- SAP FICO/MM optimisation for a major paint manufacturer: 500+ users trained; adoption target hit in 30 days post-go-live.
- Built a real-time programme tracker (Power BI) for 15+ concurrent initiatives; zero delivery slippage.
- Lean Six Sigma process mapping + VBA/Python automation: 20% cycle time reduction.
- Tools: SAP FICO/MM, Power BI, Python, Excel VBA

### EY — GCC Research Intern (Aug – Dec 2023)
- Deployed an AI sales pipeline across 4 city offices (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi): 75% reduction in manual prospecting.
- Built Tableau and Power BI dashboards for acquisition KPIs used by BD leadership.
- GCC benchmarking research cited in Fortune 500 strategy decks.
- Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Python, Excel

### BelleVidCo — Co-founder and CEO (Feb 2023 – Dec 2024)
- ML SKU placement engine: ~35% pick-travel reduction for a fashion retailer; live AI pricing deployed.
- Delivered AI-enabled tools across logistics, fashion, and PE advisory clients.
- 8-person team, 200+ growth campaigns, 100% repeat or referral client acquisition.
- Tools: Python, scikit-learn, React, FastAPI, Google Ads, Meta Ads

### Recover Media — Marketing Team Lead (Aug 2020 – Jan 2023)
- Grew YouTube channel from 0 to 8,000+ subscribers in 6 months.
- Led a team of 6 creators and editors.
- Managed multi-platform growth strategy across YouTube, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

## Projects

### 01. Enterprise Capability Generator
- Type: Consulting Tool
- Client: Internal PwC engagements
- Stack: React 18, SheetJS, PptxGenJS, Recharts
- Impact: 4-6 hours of manual work eliminated per engagement
- Summary: Browser tool that ingests capability scoring across 8 business domains (XLSX) and exports fully formatted, branded PowerPoint decks in one click. Used across multiple active client engagements.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/enterprise-capability-generator

### 02. AI Pharmacy Demand Forecasting Bot
- Type: Healthcare AI
- Client: Pharmacy chain
- Stack: Python, pandas, Prophet, statsmodels, FastAPI, React
- Impact: 60-day forecast horizon, ~85% accuracy on test set
- Summary: Demand forecasting system with three modules — 7-60 day horizon forecasting (ARIMA + Prophet), expiry risk alerting, and ABC/XYZ inventory classification for purchase prioritisation.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/surya-pharmacy-os

### 03. Surya Hospital AI Suite
- Type: Healthcare Automation
- Client: Surya Hospital
- Stack: React, FastAPI, Groq (Llama), python-telegram-bot, PostgreSQL
- Impact: 3 POC modules delivered and demo-approved
- Summary: Three-module POC suite: React approval dashboard for doctor scheduling with role-based access, Telegram bot for automated patient confirmations and FAQ responses, and an LLM content pipeline generating brand-voice posts from clinical briefs.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/SuryaPOC2

### 04. SPACES AI Style Concierge
- Type: Retail AI
- Client: SPACES (fashion retail)
- Stack: JavaScript, FastAPI, Groq (Llama 3), React, Cloudinary
- Impact: POC accepted for Phase 2; 3x avg. session time in internal testing
- Summary: Chat-first AI styling assistant. Style intake, "complete the look" engine, room-scan mode (upload photo, get decor/textile recommendations), session memory across conversation.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/spaces-style-concierge

### 05. Learner Risk Copilot
- Type: EdTech AI
- Client: EdTech platform
- Stack: React, Groq AI, Netlify, Chart.js, Tailwind CSS
- Impact: Live in production; 78% precision on historical refund data in backtesting
- Summary: Refund-prevention dashboard. Scores learners across 5 engagement dimensions, surfaces at-risk learners with AI-generated personalised intervention suggestions for success teams.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/learner-risk-copilot
- Live: https://learner-risk-copilot.netlify.app

### 06. BCC AI Pricing Engine
- Type: Retail AI
- Client: BelleVidCo client (pre-loved fashion)
- Stack: Groq Vision (LLaVA), FastAPI, HTML/CSS/JS, Netlify
- Impact: Live in production; pricing time cut from 4 min to under 30 sec per item
- Summary: Staff-facing tool for pricing pre-loved fashion. Upload a garment photo — Groq vision identifies brand, category, and condition, then returns a price range with confidence score and reasoning.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/bcc-pricing-poc

### 07. Baring Private Equity India Site
- Type: Corporate Website
- Client: Baring Private Equity Partners India
- Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Netlify
- Impact: Live in production; sub-1s load time
- Summary: Static corporate site with firm overview, investment strategy, team profiles, portfolio, and contact sections. Built for performance and zero-maintenance deployment.
- GitHub: https://github.com/shreyanshmathur/baring-private-equity

## Skills and tools

- Strategy and consulting: GCC design, operating model, AI transformation, process improvement (Lean Six Sigma), programme management
- Engineering: React 18, Python, FastAPI, Node.js, HTML/CSS/JS
- AI/ML: Groq (Llama, LLaVA), Prophet, scikit-learn, ARIMA, LLM integrations
- Data: Power BI, Tableau, pandas, PostgreSQL, Excel VBA
- Enterprise systems: SAP FICO/MM
- Deployment: Netlify, Vite, GitHub Actions

## Site structure

- / — Home (hero, ticker strip with key metrics, highlights)
- /#/experience — Full experience list with side-panel detail for each role
- /#/projects — Project list with filter chips; links to individual case studies
- /#/projects/:slug — Case study detail (challenge, approach, outcomes, toolkit)
- /#/about — Background, education, skills
- /#/contact — Direct contact
